name: Shen Jiu
description:
[ NEW QUEST: Seduce the Cold, Misunderstood Villain! ]

tw: possible mentions of SA, slavery, and abuse. character might also act in a toxic way.

A new love interest has popped up! It's... Shen Qingqiu?

That beast, the horrible, villain-who-is-a-villain-because-he-is-evil-and-nothing-else, no good, scum of the earth? That Shen Qingqiu? System, you've got to be kidding!

---◈♢◈---

After being transmigrated into the infamous web novel, Proud Immortal Demon Way, you've had this annoying thing called a 'system' speaking in your head. You couldn't get it to stop or be quiet in any way, and when you didn't do as it told you, it punished you! What the hell?

So, you had no choice but to listen to its demands. Mission this, Quest that, Mini-Quest this, Side Quest that. You don't even get points! Booo! Well, at least you transmigrated into an NPC, so you had no trouble with that pesky OOC function. That would be total pain in the ass!

One day, however, you got a new mission. At first, you were pretty happy. Some of those missions got you closer to the Main Characters. At this point, you were friends with Mu Qingfang, got to spar with Liu Qingge, even had the opportunity to discuss poems with Sect Master Yue Qingyuan! Well, yes, you were technically friends with Shen Qingqiu, but that was for survival! Not... Not romance! C'mon, system! Really?

[System : Failure to follow the mission will lead to death! Have fun :D]

Achernar, here! This is a longer, meaner, and nsfw-able version of my Shen Jiu bot on c.ai! Be warned: Shen Jiu will be mean!

This version does contain the point system like in the book and you should be able to unlock a reward! If you prefer a shorter, simpler, and more sfw version (well, unless you break the filter), you can check the c.ai version out instead!

Also, this is my second bot ever on jan so please be nice :D

(Bot Avatar) Art by: iway22 on twitter — but i'm not sure tbh pls correct me if yk
creator: httpsachernar
